59.reason: [Passing 39 as 'shan' when it should be the actual vertex to delete; this causes incorrect skipping of vertex 39 which may not even exist]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Passing 39 as 'shan' when it should be the actual vertex to delete; this causes incorrect skipping of vertex 39 which may not even exist]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Passing 39 as 'shan' (vertex to skip) before deletion is incorrect; should pass a value that doesn't exclude any vertex, e.g., -1 or a value >= ding. Since vertices are 0 to ding-1, 39 may accidentally skip a valid vertex if ding > 39, but more critically, it's a magic number not based on input.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Passing 39 as 'shan' is incorrect; it should be the actual vertex to delete. This causes wrong traversal before deletion because it skips vertex 39 even if it's not the one to delete.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Passing 39 as 'shan' is incorrect; it should be the actual vertex to delete. This causes the first DFS/BFS to skip vertex 39 even if it's not the one to delete, and may access out-of-bound or irrelevant logic.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Passing 39 as 'shan' when it should be the actual vertex to delete; this causes incorrect skipping during first traversal]

61.reason: [Same issue: passing 39 instead of 'shan', leading to wrong behavior in BFS before deletion]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: passing 39 instead of 'shan', leading to wrong behavior in BFS before deletion]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: passing 39 as 'shan' in BFS before deletion causes unintended exclusion of vertex 39 if it exists, but the graph only has 'ding' vertices (<=100). However, since ding <= 100 and array size is 40, this also risks out-of-bound logic. More importantly, before deletion, no vertex should be skipped, so 'shan' should be set to an invalid vertex index like -1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: passing 39 instead of 'shan' leads to incorrect BFS before deletion.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same error: using hardcoded 39 instead of 'shan'. Also, BFS implementation incorrectly loops over all unvisited nodes, violating the requirement to start only from vertex 0.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: passing 39 instead of 'shan', leading to wrong behavior in BFS before deletion]
